headline: A Look At Erie Indemnity (ERIE) Valuation As Weak Recent Returns Contrast With DCF Upside Potential
summary: What Recent Returns Signal For Erie Indemnity (ERIE) With no single headline event driving attention, Erie Indemnity (ERIE) has still drawn investor interest after a period where the share price showed negative returns over the past week, month and past 3 months.
